---
title: "rate of payment of <i>MP</i> contributors"
---

## rate of payment of <i>MP</i> contributors

**Type:** topic

### Letters Mentioning This Organization

- [To Frederick Orridge Macmillan, 1899](../letters/3391_To_Frederick_Orridge_Macmillan.html)

*... and 2 more*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
